ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of attending the university */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the university */,
  "campus_setting" TEXT /* Campus setting (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "student_faculty_ratio" REAL /* Student-faculty ratio */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate */,
  "average_starting_salary" REAL /* Average starting salary of graduates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_majors" (
  "university_major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university-major pair */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university that offers the major */,
  "major" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merit_aid" (
  "merit_aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merit aid record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university that offered the merit aid */,
  "received_merit_aid" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the merit aid was received */,
  "avg_merit_aid" REAL /* Average merit aid offered by the university */,
  "max_merit_aid" REAL /* Maximum merit aid offered by the university */,
  "merit_aid_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving merit aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merit_aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merit_aid_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merit_match" (
  "merit_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MeritMatch result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the MeritMatch result */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university that was matched */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the MeritMatch (e.g., matched, not matched) */,
  "predicted_merit_aid" REAL /* Predicted merit aid amount for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merit_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merit_match_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merit_match_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "academic_performance" REAL /* Academic performance of the student (e.g., GPA) */,
  "extracurricular_activities" TEXT /* Extracurricular activities of the student */,
  "leadership_experience" TEXT /* Leadership experience of the student */,
  "community_service" TEXT /* Community service experience of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the application */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university to which the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the application decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_documents" (
  "application_document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application to which the document belongs */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., transcript, letter of recommendation) */,
  "document_link" TEXT /* Link to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_contacts" (
  "university_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university contact */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university to which the contact belongs */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_contacts_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_reviews" (
  "university_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university review */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_reviews_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
